trivia: China's first homegrown mainline jet took on the A320 and 737 duopoly. Its fleet is young, growing fast, and concentrated with Chinese carriers, making it a prized catch almost everywhere else.
For most of the world this is a genuinely rare type today; re-reviews will track how quickly that changes.
funFacts: Entered service with China Eastern in 2023.
Powered by the same LEAP engine family as the A320neo and 737 MAX.
